title: schizachyrium cirratum
intro: Schizachyrium cirratum, also known as Little Bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizachyrium cirratum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Schizachyrium cirratum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
